Our process

From sketch to shelter

Four stages stand between your plot and your dream home. We stay hands-on for every one of them.

01 — Elevation design

Your choice, your requirement, your preference

We design your elevation exactly to your taste. Seeing it rendered before construction begins is the surest way to turn imagination into a genuinely beautiful reality.

02 — Colour & material consultation

Start-to-end colour guidance

Real catalogue codes from Asian Paints, Berger, Nerolac, Indigo and Nippon, plus leading ceramic brands like Kajaria — so you're choosing from what's actually on the shelf.

Earth Song · 8550 Metallic Grey · 8296 Dark Shadow · 8294

*Don't rely on the code alone — we always confirm shades physically before you commit.

03 — Precise dimensioning

Down to the last half-inch

Dimensions are critical for co-ordinating every building component and making sure each one fits exactly where it belongs in construction. And yes — we are precise.

04 — Video walkthrough

No blind spots

Every project ships with a walkthrough video for a better understanding of the design — seen the way you'll actually experience it, not just a flat elevation.

About us

Converting dreams into working plans.

Hello, everyone. Welcome to Shelter Sketches — a group of engineers based in Pondicherry, India. We provide the best and most unique visualization for your dream house, with accurate detail in every drawing. It's what keeps us energised: more ideas, more possibilities, for your dream home.

Led by Suganesh, B.E. Civil — Founder

Let's get started

Ready to unfold your story?

Send us your plot details and let's sketch your elevation together.
